testcase.name: Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › Successful login with OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › Verify OTP during login
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › Verify login placeholders
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Toggle password visibility
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Login without accepting terms
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Invalid email format
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Incorrect password
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Retry login after failed attempt
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Login with invalid OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Forgot Password without entering OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Empty email
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Empty password
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Both email and password empty
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › OTP shorter/longer than expected
